mnemonics.title: Transaction Fields: NGGTVDS
mnemonics.content:
**N**once (sequential counter)
**G**as Price / Max Fee
**G**as Limit (max computation)
**T**o (recipient address)
**V**alue (ETH in wei)
**D**ata (contract calls/bytecode)
**S**ignature (v, r, s)

mnemonics.title: Three Tx Types: TDI
mnemonics.content:
**T**ransfer (simple ETH) - to=EOA, data=empty
**D**eploy (contract creation) - to=null, data=bytecode
**I**nteract (function call) - to=contract, data=encoded call

mnemonics.title: EIP-1559 = Burn + Tip
mnemonics.content:
**Base Fee** = automatically calculated = BURNED (deflationary)
**Priority Fee** = user's tip = goes to VALIDATOR
**Max Fee** = ceiling the user sets
Savings: Max Fee - (Base + Priority) = refunded

mnemonics.title: Gas Outcomes: Success, Exact, Fail
mnemonics.content:
Gas Used < Limit = SUCCESS + refund unused gas
Gas Used = Limit = SUCCESS + no refund
Gas Used > Limit = FAIL + reverted + NO refund
Remember: Failure still costs gas!

mnemonics.title: Tx Lifecycle: CBMBEF
mnemonics.content:
**C**reate and sign
**B**roadcast to network
**M**empool waiting
**B**lock inclusion by validator
**E**VM execution
**F**inality (~12.8 min PoS)
